---
title: "Olympics Wrangling"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(rvest)
```

### Data Wrangling:

```{r}
# Read in the All olympic mdalists data
library(tidyverse)
athletes <- vroom::vroom('all_athletes.csv')
```

```{r}
# Selecting Columns from athletes and making factors
athletes <- athletes %>%
  select(-c(id, height, weight, team, city))

athletes$sex <- as.factor(athletes$sex)
athletes$season <- as.factor(athletes$season)

athletes$medal[is.na(athletes$medal)] <- "None"
athletes$medal <- as.factor(athletes$medal)
```

### Scraping

```{r}
url <- "https://www.olympedia.org/statistics/medal/country"
page <- read_html(url)
tables <- page |> html_elements("table")
df_list <- tables |> html_table()
medals_by_country <- df_list[[1]]
names(medals_by_country)[1:2] <- c("Country", "NOC")
```
